content: Phase 1: Get design guidelines from design_agent
Phase 1: Build Vault/Seal SVG component with state machine
Phase 1: Implement audio cues with mute toggle
Phase 1: Screenshot and validate vault animations
Phase 2: Backend — FastAPI models, endpoints, seed data
Phase 2: Frontend — Landing/Role picker, Explore feed, Create Bond wizard
Phase 2: Frontend — Bond Dashboard, Join flow, Proof submission, Release, Share
Phase 2: Wire full end-to-end loop with seeded bonds + new bond creation
Phase 3a: Pull user's GitHub push (auth, payments, WS, refs, leaderboards, templates, storage)
Phase 3a: Add feature-flag system (backend env-based router mounting + frontend config endpoint)
Phase 3a: Install new backend deps (pyjwt, bcrypt, stripe, boto3 if needed)
Phase 3a: Wrap auth dependencies to soft-fail when ENABLE_AUTH=0 (return demo user)
Phase 3a: Frontend AuthProvider + ProtectedRoute pass-through when disabled
Phase 3a: Verify demo still works with all flags OFF (screenshot)
